title: Emberfall Viking Modpack
description: Modpack to use when playing in our viking event!
body:
# Emberfall Viking Modpack
This pack is for the brave adventureres of the north! It includes a bunch of new features mostly in the combat and roleplaying side of the game.

The pack is multiplayer orianted and dosent include new structures or mobs, it is made mainly for the emberfall 100 player viking event which is primarily a roleplay/worldbuilding game

### 
### The modpack adds:
- Over 30 performance mods!
- New methods of traveling abroad such as ships and buffed horses
- New weapons like a glaive and a hammer
- Distant horizons + Iris shader
- Darker and more realistic textures
- New furniture to decorate your viking house

We hope you enjoy!
